candidate.name: Sample Junior SDR
candidate.cvText:
Junior SDR at Datadog
Boston, MA
9 months as SDR; first GTM role after college.

SDR · Datadog · Boston, MA
- 110% quota in Q3, ramping team-wide
- Outbound prospecting, cold calling, sequences, cadence design in Salesloft
- Pipeline generation: 25+ SQLs/month
- Tools: Salesloft, Outreach, Apollo, ZoomInfo, Salesforce, HubSpot
- Sales development representative funnel — MQL → SQL → demo booked
knownIssues: cv-pulse rubric mismatch (upstream): role_type='sales' → AE-rubric default. CV has strong SDR signal — detectRole should pick SDR cleanly when run.

Matcher gap B1 (this repo): Junior SDR → MM/Enterprise AE within-family role-type mismatch undercounted. Both classify as 'sales' family with no penalty for the SDR↔AE distinction. ae-mm + ae-enterprise Good-band scores below are matcher artefacts.

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive
jobs.note: B1: junior SDR → MM AE within-family gap; matcher returns Good (78). SHOULD be Partial.

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
jobs.note: B1: junior SDR → Enterprise AE within-family gap; matcher returns Good (76). SHOULD be Partial.

jobs.title: Junior Customer Success Manager
jobs.note: Cross-family + junior in title. None defensible — matcher correctly penalises stretch.

jobs.title: Marketing Coordinator
jobs.note: Cross-family marketing + low cvScore. None defensible.

jobs.title: SDR Team Lead
jobs.note: Same family, level-up. Matcher correctly gives Good (74) — title 'Lead' triggers managerRole +10 penalty.
